content.description:
Field editor for single-line text using HTML text input. The default field editor used by [system:generic-editor](item://ffd688d1-93a8-4c4b-b09a-127b249294f5) when no specific editor is specified, or with `editor: 'text'`.

## Options

- `placeholder`: Placeholder text when empty
- `readonly`: Makes input non-editable

## Fallback Behavior

When the generic editor encounters an unknown editor type, it falls back to this text editor.
